fullDescription.text: Suspicious reference subprocess.call The 'subprocess' module allows spawning new processes and executing system commands. This is a critical security risk as it enables arbitrary command execution on the host system.

fullDescription.text: Potentially unsafe pickle operation detected This NumPy file contains an array with 'object' dtype that stores arbitrary Python objects via pickle. If consumer code loads this file with numpy.load(allow_pickle=True), it can execute embedded code (CVE-2019-6446, CVSS 9.8).

help.text: This NumPy file contains an array with 'object' dtype that stores arbitrary Python objects via pickle. If consumer code loads this file with numpy.load(allow_pickle=True), it can execute embedded code (CVE-2019-6446, CVSS 9.8).
help.markdown: This NumPy file contains an array with 'object' dtype that stores arbitrary Python objects via pickle. If consumer code loads this file with numpy.load(allow_pickle=True), it can execute embedded code (CVE-2019-6446, CVSS 9.8).

CVE-2019-6446: NumPy array uses 'object' dtype which requires pickle deserialization. This is a potential RCE vector when consumer code loads with allow_pickle=True.

properties.description: NumPy object arrays use pickle for serialization. numpy.load() with allow_pickle=True deserializes arbitrary Python objects, enabling RCE.
properties.remediation: Use NumPy >= 1.16.3 where allow_pickle defaults to False. Never set allow_pickle=True with untrusted .npy/.npz files. Use numeric dtypes instead of object.

Model references custom operator domain 'custom'. This is metadata only - ensure operators are from trusted sources before installation.

properties.security_note: Custom domains indicate dependencies on external operator implementations. ONNX files cannot execute code - risk is in runtime environment if malicious operators are installed. Verify operator packages before installation.

message.text: CVE-2022-25882: External data path traversal for tensor 'weights' - path '../../../../etc/passwd' resolves outside model directory

properties.description: ONNX external_data location uses path traversal to access files outside the model directory
properties.remediation: Validate that external_data paths do not contain '..' or resolve outside the model directory before loading. Update to ONNX >= 1.16.0.

message.text: CVE-2025-51480: External data path traversal for '../../../../etc/passwd' (1 tensor affected) can enable arbitrary file overwrite when saving

properties.description: ONNX save_external_data writes tensor data to paths from external_data location fields. Path traversal can overwrite arbitrary files.
properties.remediation: Validate external_data paths before onnx.save(). Update ONNX to a patched version and run model processing with minimal filesystem privileges.

message.text: Model references custom operator domain 'malicious_ops'. This is metadata only - ensure operators are from trusted sources before installation.

properties.security_note: Custom domains indicate dependencies on external operator implementations. ONNX files cannot execute code - risk is in runtime environment if malicious operators are installed. Verify operator packages before installation.
